title: Floating City Postage Stamp Diorama AI
sourceTitle: Floating City Postage Stamp Diorama AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: A breathtaking miniature floating city diorama emerging from a vintage cream postage stamp, featuring New York as a compact island landscape. Manhattan skyline, Brooklyn Bridge, Central Park greenery, harbor boats, waterfront promenades, tiny people, and elegant art deco towers blend seamlessly into the stamp surface. The city rises dramatically as a hyper-realistic 3D paper-craft sculpture with collectible souvenir stamp design and a small clean caption reading "NEW YORK". Golden sunrise lighting, soft volumetric clouds, atmospheric haze, cinematic aerial perspective, realistic reflections, tilt-shift photography, intricate urban details, luxurious travel-poster aesthetic, vibrant colors, ultra-sharp focus. No logos, no watermark, no extra random text. landmarks: Manhattan skyline, Brooklyn Bridge, Central Park, harbor boats, art deco towers. landscape: compact island with waterfront promenades and tiny people. stamp design: vintage cream postage stamp base with small NEW YORK caption. lighting: golden sunrise, soft volumetric clouds, tilt-shift aerial perspective.
imagePrompts.title: Stamp New York

imagePrompts.prompt: A breathtaking miniature floating city diorama emerging from a vintage ivory postage stamp, featuring Shanghai as a compact river-island landscape. Lujiazui skyline, classic Bund facades, Huangpu River, garden bridges, modern towers, waterfront promenades, boats, cultural streets, and tiny people blend into the stamp surface. The city rises dramatically as a hyper-realistic 3D paper-craft sculpture with collectible souvenir stamp design and a small clean caption reading "SHANGHAI". Golden sunrise haze, reflective river light, soft volumetric clouds, cinematic aerial perspective, tilt-shift depth of field, intricate urban details, luxurious travel-poster aesthetic, vibrant but refined colors. No logos, no watermark, no extra random text. landmarks: Lujiazui skyline, Bund facades, Huangpu River, garden bridges, modern towers. landscape: river island with promenades, boats, old-new urban contrast. stamp design: vintage ivory postage stamp with small SHANGHAI caption. lighting: golden sunrise haze and reflective river light.
imagePrompts.title: Stamp Shanghai

imagePrompts.prompt: A breathtaking miniature floating city diorama emerging from a vintage pale green postage stamp, featuring Singapore as a compact tropical island city. Marina Bay skyline, futuristic garden tree structures, waterfront promenades, tropical parks, elegant bridges, boats on crystal-blue water, clean cultural districts, and tiny people blend into the stamp surface. The city rises dramatically as a hyper-realistic 3D paper-craft sculpture with collectible souvenir stamp design and a small clean caption reading "SINGAPORE". Golden tropical sunrise lighting, soft mist, atmospheric haze, cinematic aerial perspective, realistic reflections, tilt-shift photography, luxurious travel-poster aesthetic, vibrant colors, ultra-sharp focus. No logos, no watermark, no extra random text. landmarks: Marina Bay skyline, Supertree-like garden structures, waterfront, tropical parks, bridges. landscape: clean tropical island city with boats and tiny people. stamp design: vintage pale green postage stamp with small SINGAPORE caption. lighting: golden tropical sunrise, soft mist, crisp reflections.
